Thanks to its 1600 W motor and pneumatic impact mechanism, the hammer can handle even very demanding applications such as cutting into stone, brick or concrete. Effective demolition is made possible by powerful impact impulses that disrupt the material structure while the chisel rotates through the material and breaks it out.
